failure_modes.text: The challenge can drift below skill and slide into boredom unless the task evolves with ability.
failure_modes.mitigation: Deliberately escalate challenge as skill grows; a static task level will slide from flow into boredom.

failure_modes.text: If the challenge outruns ability, the state flips from immersion into anxiety or frustration.
failure_modes.mitigation: Calibrate challenge to the current edge of ability; pushing too far flips the state from productive immersion into anxiety.

failure_modes.text: Intense immersion can create tunnel vision on the wrong problem if the big picture is never revisited.
failure_modes.source_quote: danger when the team is entering flow on the wrong problem
failure_modes.mitigation: Schedule periodic big-picture check-ins during deep work to verify the immersion is solving the right problem.

premortem_questions.text: Is the current challenge still sitting at the edge of competence, or has it become too easy or too overwhelming?
premortem_questions.source_quote: challenged at the peak of their ability

premortem_questions.text: What feedback loop will tell us quickly if this work is drifting out of the flow channel?
How does this deep work block solve the ultimate problem instead of just feeling productive?
premortem_questions.source_quote: How does what I'm doing right now solve the ultimate problem?

heuristics.text: Match challenge to skill deliberately instead of assuming immersion will appear on its own.
Structure deep work as repeated cycles of variable review, next-step attack, and consolidation.
heuristics.source_quote: deep work is an activity well suited to generate a flow state

heuristics.text: Increase challenge as skill grows so the system does not stagnate into boredom.

curation_notes.summary: Chunk set stays close to the source's strongest failure modes, premortem questions, and repeatable heuristics.
donor_drops: Did not widen the chunk surface beyond clearly source-backed failure, premortem, and heuristic material.
open_questions: Some chunk text is compressed for operational reuse, but each item stays traceable to explicit source language.

allies: Relation-rich ally material was left for Wave 3 instead of being smuggled into chunk text.
antagonists: Bias and conflict material stronger as first-order relations was deferred to Wave 3.
structured_tensions: Any higher-order candidacy remains observational only in batch artifacts.
